pickup.name: Volcanic Magma Shard
pickup.effect: Grants fire damage attacks

encounters.trigger: The defeat of the Eel reveals a pathway leading into the inner sanctum.

pickup.name: Tidal Essence Pearl
pickup.effect: Allows underwater breathing and speed

encounters.trigger: The sentinel crumbles, unlocking the blast doors to the central chamber.

pickup.name: Ancient Relic Key
pickup.effect: The only item capable of harming the boss

encounters.trigger: The Guardian vanishes, opening the final gate to the boss arena.

boss.name: Leviathan of the Void
boss.victory_condition: Use the relic key to shatter the Leviathan's protective core

level.objective: Retrieve the Heart of the Sea from the deepest point of the temple.

level.setting: The Abyssal Coral Gardens, a bioluminescent reef illuminated by soft, pulsing flora.

pickup.name: Luminous Pearl
pickup.effect: Brightens the surroundings, calming aggressive local fauna

encounters.trigger: Defeating the swarm clears the path to the Sunken Temple Ruins

pickup.name: Enchanted Seaweed Bindings
pickup.effect: Allows the beastmaster to temporarily soothe larger aquatic creatures

encounters.trigger: After soothing the crab, a secret whirlpool opens leading to the Abyssal Core

pickup.name: Ancient Conch Shell
pickup.effect: Contains the harmonic resonance frequency required to disable the Boss's shielding

encounters.trigger: The turtle drops the key to the main chamber, activating the final boss barrier

boss.name: Elder Leviathan
boss.victory_condition: Use the shell's resonance to dispel the Leviathan's barrier, then bond with it to pacify

level.objective: Restore balance to the Abyssal Coral Gardens by pacifying the Elder Leviathan.
level.reward: The ability to summon the Leviathan for underwater travel.

level.setting: The Sunken Cathedral of R'lyeh, deep underwater, flooded and decaying

pickup.name: Vial of Black Ichors
pickup.effect: Corrodes biological matter

encounters.trigger: Defeating the Acolyte unlocks the pressure seal to the Nave

pickup.name: Cursed Pearl of Sight
pickup.effect: Reveals hidden spirits and weak points

encounters.trigger: The Wraith's death triggers the collapse of the central chandelier, revealing the path to the Crypt

pickup.name: Siphon Heart
pickup.effect: Absorbs soul energy for a finishing blow

encounters.trigger: Killing the Guardian initiates the ritual to summon the final boss

boss.name: Leviathan of the Void
boss.victory_condition: Use the Siphon Heart to drain the boss's immortality shield

level.objective: Purge the sunken cathedral of the corrupted void entities
level.reward: The Trident of the Deep Sea Sovereign

level.setting: Sunken research facility in the Mariana Trench

pickup.name: Conductive Gel Canister
pickup.effect: Increases electrical damage range

encounters.trigger: Opening the airlock floods the next corridor

pickup.name: Overcharged Battery Cell
pickup.effect: Allows for a massive lightning discharge

encounters.trigger: Debris falls and seals the path to the main command deck

pickup.name: Ancient Seismic Core
pickup.effect: Stabilizes energy levels for the boss fight

encounters.trigger: The Guardian dies, overloading the terminal and unlocking the Deep Abyss Vault

boss.name: The Leviathan Prime
boss.victory_condition: Use the Ancient Seismic Core to neutralize the Leviathan's bio-electric field then finish it

level.objective: Escape the facility before the structural integrity fails completely
level.reward: The Trident of the Deep Sea Sovereign

level.setting: Sunken Temple of the Abyssal Void

pickup.name: Bioluminescent Algae Vial
pickup.effect: Reveals hidden traps and enemy weak points

encounters.trigger: Defeating the Sentry causes the corridor to flood, forcing the player into the Ritual Chamber.

pickup.name: Corroded Iron Key
pickup.effect: Unlocks the mechanism holding back the tide

encounters.trigger: The death of the Eel shatters the seal on the inner Sanctum.

pickup.name: Ancient Leviathan Scale
pickup.effect: Absorbs abyssal energy to weaken the final boss

encounters.trigger: Slaying the Void Crab triggers the Leviathan to awaken in the throne room.

boss.name: Leviathan of the Abyss
boss.victory_condition: Use the scale to stabilize the pressure, then strike the heart.

level.objective: Retrieve the stolen Heart of the Sea from the Leviathan's lair.

pickup.name: Volatile Oxygen Tank
pickup.effect: Increases fire damage but causes self-burn on use

encounters.trigger: Defeating the crab opens the pressure valve to the Research Lab.

pickup.name: Deep-Sea Igniter Fluid
pickup.effect: Allows fire attacks to burn underwater without extinguishing

encounters.trigger: The eel's collapse triggers the emergency quarantine doors, revealing the reactor core.

pickup.name: Super-Heated Core Fragment
pickup.effect: A massive heat source that can supercharge fire spells

encounters.trigger: The shark's destruction destabilizes the core, summoning the Dome Guardian.

boss.name: Dome Guardian Leviathan
boss.victory_condition: Overload the Leviathan's armor using the fragment while it is stunned by a thermal burst.

level.objective: Prevent the Bio-Dome from imploding by purging the oceanic corruption.
level.reward: The Eternal Flame of the Abyss

pickup.name: Conductive Gel
pickup.effect: Increases projectile damage and adds electric charge

encounters.trigger: Debris falls, blocking the return path and forcing access to the flooded laboratory.

pickup.name: Thermal Flare
pickup.effect: Temporarily blinds photosensitive enemies and melts reinforced seals

encounters.trigger: A structural collapse seals the research wing and drains the main corridor.

pickup.name: Reactor Bypass Key
pickup.effect: Overrides the security system for the final bulkhead

encounters.trigger: The reactor goes critical, overriding the blast door locks to the boss chamber.

boss.name: The Leviathan Warden
boss.victory_condition: Insert the key into the boss's dorsal port to overload its armor systems.

level.objective: Decommission the sunken laboratory's rogue AI.

level.setting: The Glimmering Coral Reef of Lost Echoes

pickup.name: Bubble-Blower Wand
pickup.effect: Creates floating orbs that distract enemies

encounters.trigger: Defeating the pufferfish causes a trail of bubbles to lead to the Sunken Tea Party

pickup.name: Starlight Conch
pickup.effect: Emits a harmonic tone that soothes aggressive creatures

encounters.trigger: Opening the clam shell reveals the path to the Jellyfish Ballroom

pickup.name: Golden Fin-Key
pickup.effect: Unlocks the throne room of the Sea King

encounters.trigger: The Disco Eel retreats, opening the heavy coral gates to the Boss Arena

boss.name: Tidal Monarch Octo-King
boss.victory_condition: Use the Golden Fin-Key to tickle the King's tentacles, causing him to laugh himself to sleep

level.objective: Retrieve the Lost Pearl of Laughter to restore joy to the reef
level.reward: The ability to speak with sea creatures and a permanent bubble-shield

level.setting: An overgrown, unstable ancient temple ruin deep within the vine-choked Amazon basin, plagued by erratic magical storms.

encounters.hazard: Slippery moss-covered ropes that threaten to plummet the player into the dark abyss below.

pickup.name: Fermented Berry Cluster
pickup.effect: Increases attack speed temporarily when consumed.

encounters.trigger: Defeating the viper causes the tree branch to snap, dropping the player into the Temple Courtyard.

encounters.hazard: Swirling magical winds that blow debris at the player, staggering movement.

pickup.name: Sacred Sunstone Shard
pickup.effect: Emits a blinding light that disorients ancient constructs.

encounters.trigger: The Howler's scream collapses the courtyard wall, revealing the path to the Inner Sanctum.

encounters.hazard: Pressure plates that fire poison darts across the room.

pickup.name: Ancient Jungle Totem
pickup.effect: Creates a localized shield that absorbs energy-based attacks.

encounters.trigger: The Golem's destruction unlocks the main heavy iron gate leading to the Boss Arena.

boss.name: The Primal Storm Serpent
boss.victory_condition: Use the Sunstone to shatter the serpent's energy aura before dealing the final blow.

level.objective: Retrieve the Heart of the Jungle and escape the collapsing temple ruins.
level.reward: The 'Beastmaster's Bond' amulet, granting command over jungle predators.

level.setting: The Whispering Canopy, a dense jungle overgrown with bioluminescent flora

pickup.name: Sun-Kissed Pollen
pickup.effect: Temporarily reveals hidden weak points on organic enemies

encounters.trigger: Defeating the Stalker clears the fog, revealing the path to the Ancient Ruin

pickup.name: Amber Lens
pickup.effect: Allows the player to see through magical illusions

encounters.trigger: The Golem's collapse destroys a wall, exposing the entrance to the Forbidden Altar

encounters.hazard: Draining soul energies that reduce movement speed

pickup.name: Ritual Dagger
pickup.effect: Can be used to disable the boss's protective barrier

encounters.trigger: The Spirit's banishment awakens the Guardian of the Altar

boss.name: High Priestess of Vines
boss.victory_condition: Use the Ritual Dagger to shatter her barrier before depleting her health

level.objective: Restore balance to the Whispering Canopy by defeating the High Priestess
level.reward: The Heart of the Jungle, a relic granting eternal stealth

level.setting: A humid, claustrophobic ancient jungle temple riddled with traps and dense foliage.

pickup.name: Jaguar Oil
pickup.effect: Coats blades for poison resistance and increased armor penetration

encounters.trigger: After defeating the Stalker, the bridge collapses, dropping the player into the lower catacombs.

pickup.name: Sun-Touched Amulet
pickup.effect: Emits a blinding light when shattered, stunning ancient constructs

encounters.trigger: The Golem's death shatters the main door, revealing the Sun Temple's sanctum.

pickup.name: Sacred Incense
pickup.effect: Dispels magical shrouds and reveals enemy weak points

encounters.trigger: Defeating the Priest activates the altar's elevator, ascending to the Boss chamber.

boss.name: The Great Serpent King
boss.victory_condition: Use the Sun-Touched Amulet to blind the serpent, then strike the glowing scales on its belly with the Obsidian Daggers.

level.objective: Retrieve the Jade Heart from the Serpent King before the jungle temple collapses.

level.setting: An ancient, overgrown temple ruin deep within the Emerald Canopy

encounters.hazard: Thick pollen clouds that slightly obscure vision

pickup.name: Sun-Kissed Nectar
pickup.effect: Restores 20 health and adds light damage to melee attacks

encounters.trigger: Defeating the beetle clears the vines blocking the path to the River Basin

encounters.hazard: Slippery moss-covered stones near the water

pickup.name: Ancient Temple Key
pickup.effect: Unlocks the heavy stone door leading to the inner sanctuary

encounters.trigger: The spirit vanishes, dropping the key required to enter the boss chamber

encounters.hazard: Collapsing pillars that require careful movement

pickup.name: Warden's Sigil
pickup.effect: Doubles defense against elemental attacks

encounters.trigger: Upon defeating the Guardian, the final seal to the boss chamber breaks

boss.name: Elder Canopy Serpent
boss.victory_condition: Use the Warden's Sigil to pacify the beast and restore harmony to the jungle

level.objective: Restore the flow of the jungle river by calming the Elder Canopy Serpent
level.reward: The title of Grove Keeper and access to the Eternal Garden

level.setting: The Whispering Canopy, a dense, foggy jungle filled with skeletal remains and ancient, cursed altars.

pickup.name: Vial of Spirit Dust
pickup.effect: Temporarily blinds undead enemies

encounters.trigger: Defeating the Ghoul reveals a hidden path to the Sacred Clearing

encounters.hazard: Root traps that immobilize on contact

pickup.name: Ancient Sunstone
pickup.effect: Emits searing radiant energy

encounters.trigger: Slaying the Stalker dissipates the magical barrier protecting the Inner Sanctum

pickup.name: Cursed Effigy
pickup.effect: Severely weakens the boss's defense

encounters.trigger: The death of the Jaguar echoes through the ruins, summoning the guardian

boss.name: The Necrotic Warden
boss.victory_condition: Purify the jungle altar by binding the Warden's soul to the Bone Scythe

level.objective: Traverse the cursed jungle to stop the Necrotic Warden from raising an undead army.
level.reward: Unlock 'Soul Reaping' passive skill for the Necromancer class.

level.setting: The Giggling Canopy, a vibrant, bioluminescent jungle where the flora pulses with joyful light.

pickup.name: Ever-Fizzing Soda Bottle
pickup.effect: Deals splash damage and causes enemies to float uncontrollably

encounters.trigger: Defeating the Sporeling causes a giant flower to bloom, revealing the path to the Bubble Stream.

pickup.name: Hardened Resin Lump
pickup.effect: Increases defensive coating, reducing incoming damage by 50%

encounters.trigger: Opening the crab's treasure chest releases a swarm of fireflies that light the way to the Sun-Drenched Grove.

pickup.name: Glow-Berry Nectar
pickup.effect: Temporarily grants immunity to toxic clouds and reveals invisible platforms

encounters.trigger: The snake's laughter knocks down a hollow log, forming a bridge to the Heart of the Forest.

boss.name: Baroness Bloom
boss.victory_condition: Splash the boss with the nectar to turn her petals into harmless butterflies

level.objective: Restore the forest's rhythm by curing Baroness Bloom of her melancholy.
level.reward: The Alchemist's Golden Mortar, capable of creating permanent potions.

level.setting: An ancient, time-dilated rainforest choked by bioluminescent vines and whispering fog.

encounters.hazard: Thick mist that slows movement speed

pickup.name: Amber Hourglass
pickup.effect: Freezes enemies in a small radius for 3 seconds

encounters.trigger: Defeating the Jaguar clears the mist, revealing a path to the Sunken Temple.

encounters.hazard: Falling boulders that repeat their fall in a loop

pickup.name: Chronosand Vial
pickup.effect: Increases melee attack speed by 50%

encounters.trigger: Smashing the Sentinel unlocks the sealed inner gate of the temple.

encounters.hazard: Shadow pools that drain health over time

pickup.name: Heart of the Ages
pickup.effect: Grants immunity to time-based crowd control

encounters.trigger: Banishing the Shadow-Stalker opens the portal to the Boss's throne room.

boss.name: The Chrono-Archon of Decay
boss.victory_condition: Channel the Heart of the Ages to reverse the Archon's aging, shattering his physical form.

level.objective: Restore the temporal flow of the jungle by defeating the corrupted Archon.
level.reward: The Eternal Chronos-Cloak, which allows for short-range teleportation.

level.setting: An overgrown, corpse-ridden jungle temple reclaimed by a creeping, toxic mist.

pickup.effect: Ignites foliage and deals heavy burn damage

encounters.trigger: Defeating the Stalker opens the stone gate to the inner sanctum

pickup.name: Ancient Iron Chain
pickup.effect: Used to bind or immobilize enemies

encounters.trigger: The spirit collapses, revealing a passage blocked by ancient iron chains

pickup.name: Sacred Serpent Eye
pickup.effect: Nullifies shadow armor

encounters.trigger: The Guardian crashes through the floor, falling into the Boss arena below

boss.name: The God of Blighted Growth

level.objective: Purify the corruption at the heart of the jungle temple
